message:
🐛 Fix demo data shape mismatches for all compliance dashboards (#9716)

All 6 compliance MSW handlers had field names that didn't match the
TypeScript interfaces in their dashboard components, causing:
- Missing values (empty summary cards)
- 'Invalid Date' timestamps
- Blank change descriptions and actor names

Fixed handlers:
- SoD: Added compliance_score, clean/conflicted_principals, severity,
  role_a/role_b, regulation fields; added 2 sample violations
- Change Control: Matched ChangeRecord interface (timestamp, resource_kind,
  resource_name, change_type, actor, approval_status, risk_score, description)
- Data Residency: Matched ResidencySummary (compliant/non_compliant),
  ClusterRegion (region/jurisdiction), ResidencyRule (classification/enforcement),
  Violation (workload_name/workload_kind/cluster_region/message)
- STIG: Matched Finding (benchmark_id/host/comments), Benchmark (release/status/
  profile/total_rules/findings_count); expanded to 12 realistic findings
- Air-Gap: Matched ClusterReadiness (id/name/readiness_score/status),
  AirGapSummary (ready/not_ready/partial/overall_readiness); added details field
- FedRAMP: Matched Control (description/responsible/implementation),
  POAM (title/description/scheduled_completion/risk_level/vendor_dependency),
  FedRAMPScore (controls_satisfied/controls_partially_satisfied/poams_open)

Also fixed EnterpriseLayout main content area missing padding (p-4 md:p-6).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
